'''鈭歵-v-t-ch''' ('''katavtechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaperon|chaperon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaperon|chaperon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-v-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| katavtechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitavtechoko|thitavtechoko]] || [[word:jitavtechoko|jitavtechoko]] || [[word:shitavtechoko|shitavtechoko]] || [[word:kitavtechoko|kitavtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutavtechoko|thuthutavtechoko]] || [[word:jujutavtechoko|jujutavtechoko]] || [[word:shushutavtechoko|shushutavtechoko]] || [[word:kukutavtechoko|kukutavtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutavtechoko|thutavtechoko]] || [[word:jutavtechoko|jutavtechoko]] || [[word:shutavtechoko|shutavtechoko]] || [[word:kutavtechoko|kutavtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutavtechoko|thutavtechoko]] || [[word:jutavtechoko|jutavtechoko]] || [[word:shutavtechoko|shutavtechoko]] || [[word:kutavtechoko|kutavtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetavtechoko|thetavtechoko]] || [[word:jetavtechoko|jetavtechoko]] || [[word:shetavtechoko|shetavtechoko]] || [[word:ketavtechoko|ketavtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotavtechoko|thothotavtechoko]] || [[word:jojotavtechoko|jojotavtechoko]] || [[word:shoshotavtechoko|shoshotavtechoko]] || [[word:kokotavtechoko|kokotavtechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotavtechoko|thotavtechoko]] || [[word:jotavtechoko|jotavtechoko]] || [[word:shotavtechoko|shotavtechoko]] || [[word:kotavtechoko|kotavtechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tavtechoko|th忙tavtechoko]] || [[word:j忙tavtechoko|j忙tavtechoko]] || [[word:sh忙tavtechoko|sh忙tavtechoko]] || [[word:k忙tavtechoko|k忙tavtechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
